hints.ADD: Combine two numbers to get a sum
hints.SUBTRACT: Take one number away from another
hints.DIVIDE: Split into equal parts; finds a quotient
hints.VARIABLE: Letter that stands in for an unknown value
hints.COEFFICIENT: The number multiplied by a variable
hints.CONSTANT: A fixed number that doesn't change
hints.EXPONENT: Tells you how many times to multiply a base by itself
hints.RATIONAL: Any number that can be written as a fraction
hints.INTEGER: A whole number, positive or negative
hints.REAL: Any number on the number line, including irrationals
hints.PI: Ratio of a circle's circumference to its diameter
hints.SIGMA: Greek letter used to mean 'sum of'
hints.DELTA: Greek letter for 'change in' a value
hints.THETA: Greek letter often used for an angle
